I. New Top-Level Explores Added


Two entirely new top-level explores have been added:

Explore Name

Explore Display Name

Primary Key

concurrency

Query Concurrency

concurrency.pk

scheduled_plan_oauth_events

Scheduled Plan OAuth Events

N/A


II. New Views and Fields Added


This section summarizes new views and significant field additions within existing or new explores.


A. New Views

Explore

New View Name

View Display Name

Purpose/Key Fields

api_usage

api_usage_hourly

API Usage Duration Histogram

Provides hourly API usage duration data.

api_usage_hourly (New)

api_usage_endpoint

API Usage Endpoint

Details on API endpoints, including HTTP verb and path.

dashboard

content_metadata

Dashboard

Contains a slug field for unique content identification.

query_metrics

dashboard_element

Dashboard Element (User-defined only)

Provides granular details on dashboard tiles (e.g., text, notes, refresh intervals).

concurrency (New)

concurrency

Concurrency

Contains concurrency fraction data.

concurrency (New)

query_intervals

DB Connection

Includes query timing metrics like async processing and queuing time.
